general.title: General
general.description: Manage your preferences and application settings.

account.title: Account
account.signInDesc: Sign in to get started with Valuecell AI features.

language.title: Language and Region
language.description: Select your preferred language and regional format for the app.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose light, dark, or follow system settings.

quotesColor.title: Quotes Color
quotesColor.description: Choose how stock quote movements are visualized across the app.

login.title: Sign In
login.tagline: The first open-source platform for financial agents.

models.title: Model Provider
models.getApiKey: Click here to get the API key
models.noModels: No models configured for this provider.

memory.title: Preserved memories
memory.description: I will remember and automatically manage useful information in chats to enhance the personalization and relevance of replies.

sandboxExchanges.title: Sandbox exchange management
sandboxExchanges.description: Connect and use exchange test environments only.

warning.title: Test environment only
warning.description: Only Binance Testnet and OKX Demo credentials are supported. No live funds are used, and strategies cannot submit orders automatically.

connection.title: Connect a sandbox exchange
connection.description: Credentials are used to validate and save this test-only connection.
connection.label: Connection label

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Saved connection metadata and test balances.

order.title: Submit a sandbox order
order.description: This explicit action creates an order only in the selected test environment.

result.title: Order status
result.description: Sanitized status metadata from the sandbox exchange.

messages.connectionFailed: Unable to validate or save the sandbox connection.
messages.invalidOrder: Provide a connection and valid order values.
messages.orderFailed: Sandbox order could not be submitted.

liveExecution.title: Live execution controls
liveExecution.description: Live exchange execution remains disabled until every server-enforced gate is satisfied.

status.description: This status is controlled by the server. Enabling it never authorizes an order by itself.

connection.title: Live exchange connection
connection.description: Credentials are submitted only to validate and create this encrypted live connection.
connection.label: Connection label
connection.withdrawalDisabled: I confirm withdrawals are disabled for this API key.
connection.ipAllowlist: I confirm an IP allowlist is configured for this API key.

risk.title: Risk policy
risk.description: Server-side policy is checked before every order.

binding.title: Strategy binding
binding.description: Only an active, non-revoked binding can route a strategy to a live connection.

authorization.title: Startup authorization
authorization.description: Authorization expires on restart and at its server-defined expiry.
authorization.manualEntry: Copy or manually transcribe this code, then type it again below. It is not retained after confirmation.

order.title: Live order test
order.description: This command can submit a real exchange order after the server completes all preflight and risk checks.
order.unavailable: Live order submission is unavailable until the server reports both the global gate and runtime authorization as active.

toast.latest: You are using the latest version
toast.availableDesc: A new version ({{version}}) is available. Would you like to install it now?
toast.installedDesc: The app needs to restart to apply the update.

strategy.title: Trading Strategies
strategy.createFirst: Create your first strategy to start trading

action.stopDesc: Stopping the strategy "{{name}}" will stop it immediately and trigger a forced liquidation. Do you want to proceed?
action.deleteDesc: Deleting the strategy "{{name}}" will stop it immediately and trigger a forced liquidation. Do you want to proceed?

portfolio.title: Portfolio Value History
portfolio.noDataDesc: Portfolio value chart will appear once trading begins

positions.title: Positions
positions.noOpenDesc: Positions will appear here when trades are opened

test.failed: Connection failed. Please check your API Key, Secret Key, or Passphrase.

okx.secretKey: Enter Secret Key (32 uppercase letters & numbers)

coinbase.passphrase: Enter Passphrase (Required for Legacy Pro API)

delete.title: Delete Strategy Prompt
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this strategy prompt? This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the prompt from the system.

empty.title: No trade history
empty.desc: Your completed trades will appear here

search.title: Stock Search
search.placeholder: Search for stock name or code

research.title: Deep Research
research.description: Analyze SEC filings to generate in-depth stock interpretation reports.

strategy.title: Automated Trading
strategy.description: Multi-strategy smart trading, automatically execute your strategies.

news.title: Pushing News
news.description: Personalized news updates on a custom schedule.

login.subtitle: Paper trading research platform
login.createAccountDescription: Set up a new paper trading workspace

errors.incompleteAuthentication: Authentication response was incomplete. Please try again.
errors.incompleteRegistration: Registration response was incomplete. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Market context and strategy research. No live orders are connected.
dashboard.workspaceStatusDescription: This workspace is for research and simulated workflows. Execution wiring is not available.
dashboard.strategyWorkflowDescription: Build repeatable rule sets, then evaluate their market context before the next platform step.
dashboard.showingRecords: Showing only deterministic server records for {{name}}.
dashboard.saveStrategyPrompt: Save a paper rules strategy to begin collecting deterministic evaluation records.
dashboard.cumulativePnlDescription: Running paper profit/loss from journal evaluations.
dashboard.noEvaluationData: No evaluation data yet. Run the strategy to collect PnL records.
dashboard.latestRuleConditionsDescription: Triggered, blocked, and unavailable conditions are reported by the server after evaluation.
dashboard.signalsUnavailable: Signal records are unavailable. No result is assumed.
dashboard.noConditions: No conditions have been recorded. Evaluate explicit market inputs to create a signal record.
dashboard.marketSource: Gate provider candles and calculated moving averages.
dashboard.marketUnavailable: Market data is unavailable from the provider. No chart data is shown.

charts.title: Charts
charts.subtitle: Explore reference market data. Chart controls do not place orders or connect an execution account.
charts.poweredByTradingView: TradingView is available as an external reference.
charts.researchContextDescription: Use chart observations to inform a rules strategy. Performance and execution remain unavailable until the backend integration step.
charts.marketSource: Gate provider candles and calculated moving averages.
charts.marketUnavailable: Market data is unavailable from the provider. No chart data is shown.

strategy.title: Rules strategy
strategy.subtitle: Define a transparent, fixed-rule playbook for paper evaluation.

explicitInputs.title: Explicit paper inputs only
explicitInputs.description: Save fixed rules, then provide typed candles and an account snapshot for deterministic evaluation. This workspace never fetches market data or submits orders.

fields.name: Strategy name
fields.marketsHint: Select up to {{max}} markets to evaluate independently.
fields.marketsError: Available markets could not be loaded. Try again shortly.
fields.candleTimeframeHint: Evaluations run on closed candles; this timeframe sets the maximum polling cadence.

marketScope.title: Market scope
marketScope.description: Choose the paper markets and bar interval used by this ruleset.

trendEntry.title: Trend entry
trendEntry.description: Enter long when the faster average crosses above the slower average.

rsi.title: RSI filter
rsi.description: Avoid entries when momentum is already stretched.

bollinger.title: Bollinger confirmation
bollinger.description: Require price to remain within its volatility band.

momentum.title: Momentum confirmation
momentum.description: Use MACD direction to confirm the crossover before a paper entry.

riskLimits.title: Paper risk limits
riskLimits.description: Limits are expressed per paper position and enforced by the deterministic server evaluator.

errors.wholeNumber: Use a whole number from {{min}} to {{max}}.
errors.slowAverage: The slow average must be larger than the fast average.
errors.belowUpperThreshold: Use a value below the upper threshold.
errors.aboveLowerThreshold: Use a value above the lower threshold.
errors.largerThanFastPeriod: Use a value larger than the fast period.
errors.positiveBelowTakeProfit: Use a positive value below take profit.

summary.title: Live rules summary
summary.description: Updates as you adjust the fixed-rule inputs.

paperStrategy.title: Paper strategy
paperStrategy.valid: Rules are valid and ready to save.
paperStrategy.help: A saved strategy must be running before evaluation. No exchange connection, order submission, or real funds are available.

executionMode.title: Strategy execution mode: paper evaluation
executionMode.description: Starting a strategy only generates signals and paper logs; it never submits sandbox orders automatically. Sandbox orders must be explicitly submitted on the sandbox exchanges page.

evaluate.title: Evaluate supplied data
evaluate.description: Paste JSON with candles and market from your own data source.

toasts.operationFailed: The paper strategy operation failed. Try again.
toasts.invalidEvaluation: Provide a JSON object with explicit candles and market inputs before evaluating.

trades.title: Trades
trades.subtitle: Server-recorded paper recommendations are shown here. No entry is an order or a submitted fill.
trades.unavailable: Paper trade records are unavailable right now. No trades are assumed.

noStrategy.title: No paper strategy selected
noStrategy.description: Save a rules strategy, start it, then evaluate explicit market inputs to create an explainable paper record.

recommendations.title: Paper trade recommendations
recommendations.description: Every record is marked not_submitted by the deterministic engine.

empty.title: No paper trades recorded
empty.description: The server has not recommended a paper buy or sell for this strategy. Evaluations that produce no action do not fabricate a trade.

ledger.title: Evaluation ledger
ledger.description: Rows come only from completed server evaluations, with the deterministic reason and sizing preserved.

separation.title: Clear separation
separation.description: This workspace never routes, represents, or settles real-market activity.

pnl.title: Cumulative PnL
pnl.description: Running paper profit/loss curve from journal evaluations.

funding.noStrategy: Save and evaluate a paper rules strategy to see its server-reported funding estimates.
funding.unavailable: Paper funding estimates are unavailable right now. No funding entries are assumed.

impact.title: Paper funding impact
impact.description: Each row is the exact impact reported for an evaluation; it does not move funds.

funding.empty: No funding impact is recorded until the server completes an evaluation for this paper strategy.

connections.title: No account connections
connections.description: Funding sources and execution accounts are deliberately absent from this paper-only workspace.

safety.title: Safe by default
safety.description: Rule evaluations cannot move money, authorize transfers, or expose account credentials.
safety.body: Paper research remains isolated from real funds.
